inputs.label: Edge Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of one edge of the cube in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of one edge of the cube in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Küpün bir kenarının metre cinsinden uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge einer Kante des Würfels in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'une arête du cube en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de un borde del cubo en metros.

inputs.label: Number of Cubes
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical cubes to calculate total surface area for.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical cubes to calculate total surface area for.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam yüzey alanını hesaplamak için aynı küplerin sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Würfel zur Berechnung der Gesamtoberfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cubes identiques pour calculer la surface totale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cubos idénticos para calcular el área superficial total.

inputs.label: Exposed Faces per Cube
inputs.businessContext: Number of faces exposed per cube (default 6 for full cube; e.g., 5 if one face is on the ground).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of faces exposed per cube (default 6 for full cube; e.g., 5 if one face is on the ground).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Küp başına açık yüzey sayısı (varsayılan 6 tam küp; örn. bir yüzü yerdeyse 5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der freiliegenden Flächen pro Würfel (Standard 6 für vollen Würfel; z.B. 5, wenn eine Fläche auf dem Boden liegt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de faces exposées par cube (par défaut 6 pour un cube complet ; par exemple 5 si une face est au sol).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de caras expuestas por cubo (por defecto 6 para un cubo completo; p. ej., 5 si una cara está en el suelo).

inputs.label: Unit Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to convert m² to desired area unit (e.g., 1 for m², 10000 for cm², 10.7639 for ft²).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to convert m² to desired area unit (e.g., 1 for m², 10000 for cm², 10.7639 for ft²).
businessContext_i18n.tr: m²'yi istenen alan birimine dönüştürmek için çarpan (örn. m² için 1, cm² için 10000, ft² için 10.7639).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Umrechnung von m² in die gewünschte Flächeneinheit (z.B. 1 für m², 10000 für cm², 10,7639 für ft²).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour convertir m² en unité de surface souhaitée (ex. 1 pour m², 10000 pour cm², 10,7639 pour ft²).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para convertir m² a la unidad de área deseada (p. ej., 1 para m², 10000 para cm², 10.7639 para ft²).

inputs.label: Safety Margin
inputs.businessContext: Percentage added to total area to account for waste, errors, or overage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage added to total area to account for waste, errors, or overage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fire, hata veya fazlalık için toplam alana eklenen yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der zur Gesamtfläche hinzugefügt wird, um Ausschuss, Fehler oder Überschuss zu berücksichtigen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage ajouté à la surface totale pour tenir compte des pertes, erreurs ou surplus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje añadido al área total para tener en cuenta desperdicios, errores o excedente.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
